title: New Dashboard Home Page with Guided Onboarding and Progress Tracking
story: As a new DataTools Pro user, I want a dashboard home page that guides me through onboarding with progress tracking and badges, so that I can quickly learn and adopt the platform's features.
description:
Create a new DataTools Dashboard that serves as the landing page after login, guiding users through the product journey.

### Welcome Section
- Introduction video (on-screen)
- Kickoff object fetching in the background (same pattern as Metrics Glossary)

### Tile 1: Dictionary Objects
- Shows count of objects in the dictionary
- If 0 objects, display a quickstart with preset CRM object groups:
  - Customer CRM Objects: Account, Opportunity, Contact, User, ContactRole, OpportunityContactRole, Task
  - Marketing CRM Objects: Lead, Campaign, Campaign Member
- After adding objects: congratulations popup with badge and next-step prompt ('Visualize your objects / Customize your view')

### Tile 2: Dictionary Views
- Dropdown showing saved dictionary views (excluding 'All')
- Default value: 'None' initially, then 'Select a view'
- After selecting a view: two icons to open Dictionary or ERD with that view

### Tile 3: Object Change Tracking
- Count of tracked object changes (starts at zero)
- Help icon with pop-up explanation
- Includes upgrade step for premium tracking features

### Tile 4: Metrics Tracked
- Count of tracked metrics (starts at zero)

### Progress & Badges
- Getting started panel tracks progress through onboarding steps
- Badge system earned by completing actions (e.g., saving a view)
- Progress bar calculated from earned badges / total badges

### ERD First-Time Experience
- Screen pop with role-based tutorial video on first ERD visit
- Left-side popup with video on first view panel visit
- Saving a view triggers the 'View Badge'
- 'What's Next' prompt: 'Inventory your metrics' → navigate to Metrics Glossary onboarding
acceptance_criteria: Dashboard home page loads after login with welcome video
Tile 1 shows object count or quickstart if zero
Quickstart adds preset CRM objects and triggers congratulations badge
Tile 2 shows dictionary views dropdown with Dictionary/ERD shortcuts
Tile 3 shows change tracking count with help icon
ERD first-time experience shows tutorial video
ux_changes: New dashboard home page with 4 tiles (objects, views, change tracking, metrics), welcome video, onboarding quickstart, congratulations popups, badge system, progress bar, and ERD first-time tutorial popups.
middleware_changes: Badge/progress tracking logic, first-time visit detection, quickstart object provisioning, and view listing for dashboard tiles.
data_model_changes: Badge and progress tracking data model for onboarding steps.
implementation_notes: Progress bar is calculated from earned badges vs total badges. Background object fetching starts automatically on first login. Tutorial video links and badge content still needed. Dev URL: /welcome-dashboard.
comment_summary: Developer requested Figma designs. Later implemented the welcome dashboard page with tiles and progress bar on dev, awaiting tutorial video links and further feedback.
